headline: Net Impact & PG&E Announce Winners of the 2026 Home Electrification Challenge
summary: Meet the 2026 Home Electrification Challenge Winners EL CERRITO, CA / ACCESS Newswire / April 29, 2026 / On the heels of San Francisco Climate Week, Net Impact, in collaboration with Pacific Gas and Electric Company (PG&E), announced the winning teams ...
